name: Hana
manager_notes: Hana is pushing hard for a Lead promotion and on craft she's close. The problem is headcount is frozen — there is no Lead role to give this cycle, maybe not next either, and that's above my control. I don't want to dangle a title I can't deliver. I want this conversation to be honest about the freeze while still giving her a real way to grow — scope, mastery, visible influence — so she doesn't feel stalled or start looking elsewhere.
answers: I feel like I've been operating at the next level for a while now.
I want to know there's a path, not just 'keep doing what you're doing'.
If the title isn't there yet, I at least want the scope that comes with it.
I'd rather hear it straight than be strung along.
Leading a project end to end would feel like real progress.
Mentoring the juniors is something I'd actually enjoy owning.
I don't want to feel like I'm standing still for a year.
Give me something concrete to aim at and I'm in.
I just don't want to look back in six months and feel stuck.
